title: mentha isophylla
intro: Mentha isophylla, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. The plant's primary medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains menthone, a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of pennyroyal include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and insect repellency, as well as its ability to alleviate headaches and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Mentha isophylla include teas, tinctures, and essential oils that can be used externally or internally, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using pennyroyal for medicinal purposes.
